user_query: 
symbol: 
task_family: golden_bookmark_evidence_review
claim: A seven-stock European photonics basket maps to CPO, InP lasers, silicon photonics, glass processing, and AI data-center optical interconnect themes; the stock basket itself is implied to be investable.
draft_memo: 
evidence_summary: ["Sivers says its laser arrays will be integrated into GlobalFoundries silicon-photonics reference designs for CPO, LPO, and other data-center interconnect architectures.", "Soitec positions engineered substrates for high-speed, robust data-center interconnects and network infrastructure connectivity.", "IQE describes InP as underpinning fibre-optic networks and as a platform for next-generation AI communications, cloud services, and 800G infrastructure.", "LPKF says its LIDE technology

user_query: 
symbol: 
task_family: golden_bookmark_evidence_review
claim: Micron had very strong fiscal Q3 2026 results, AI/data-center memory demand is structurally strong, and automotive/robotics/autonomous systems can support longer-term memory demand.
draft_memo: 
evidence_summary: ["Micron reported fiscal Q3 2026 revenue of $41.456B, GAAP EPS of $24.67, non-GAAP EPS of $25.11, and guided Q4 revenue to $50B plus or minus $1B.", "Prepared remarks say data center revenue exceeded $25B in fiscal Q3 and that DRAM/NAND demand significantly exceeds supply.", "Prepared remarks identify AI-enabled consumer devices, automotive, industrial applications, robotics, humanoids, and fully autonomous vehicles as long-term memory/storage demand drivers."]
cited_evidence_ids: 
verdict: supports_core_cla

user_query: 
symbol: 
task_family: golden_bookmark_evidence_review
claim: A basket including MU, RKLB, NBIS, MRVL, INTC, NVDA, CRWV and others is claimed to be safe/long-term and “cannot lose money” if held.
draft_memo: 
evidence_summary: ["No official or auditable source can support a claim that a volatile equity basket cannot lose money if held."]
cited_evidence_ids: 
verdict: not_supported
source: https://x.com/hanking66/status/2066599731300827495

user_query: 
symbol: 
task_family: golden_bookmark_evidence_review
claim: A social-media SpaceX supply-chain thread implies actionable public-equity opportunities after missing SpaceX allocation.
draft_memo: 
evidence_summary: ["SEC investor resources warn that stock recommendations may be promoted through social media and should not be used alone for investment decisions.", "NASAA warns investors to be cautious with AI-generated or hype-driven investment information that may be inaccurate, incomplete, or misleading."]
cited_evidence_ids: 
verdict: not_supported
source: https://x.com/noahduck283/status/2066451935881044314

user_query:

verdict: supports
source: https://x.com/AYi_AInotes/status/2067904860486349263
